gt_sql: SELECT T1.fastestLap FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'
pred_sql:
SELECT r.fastestLap
FROM races ra
JOIN driverStandings ds ON ra.raceId = ds.raceId
JOIN results r ON ds.driverId = r.driverId AND ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2009
  AND ds.position = 1
  AND r.fastestLap IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the fastest lap number of the champion in 2009?
